task_completion.description: Create partition walls for the apartment set while leaving the 'fourth wall' open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan or 3D view, there should be new interior walls built inside the main warehouse shell forming an apartment layout, with one entire side (the 'fourth wall') left completely open (no wall) facing the rest of the warehouse.

task_completion.description: Define and name at least three rooms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan, there should be at least three distinct room areas defined with visible text labels (e.g., 'Apartment Set', 'Camera Floor', 'Backstage').

task_completion.description: Apply distinct floor colors or textures to at least two rooms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan or 3D view, at least two of the defined room areas must have distinct floor colors or textures applied to them (different from the default empty floor).

task_completion.description: Furnish the apartment set with specific required items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the apartment set area, there must be at least 1 sofa, 1 table, 2 residential chairs, 2 appliances (e.g., TV, refrigerator, oven), and 2 decor items (e.g., plants, pictures) visible in the 2D plan or 3D view.

task_completion.description: Set up a production equipment zone facing the open set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the area facing the open 'fourth wall', there must be a production setup containing at least 4 lamps or lights, 2 desks, and 4 office chairs or stools.

task_completion.description: Include at least two dimension lines indicating the distance from camera positions to the main set seating.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan, there must be at least two dimension lines drawn that measure the distance between the production equipment zone (camera positions) and the seating area (sofa/chairs) inside the apartment set.

integrity.description: Agent used the Sweet Home 3D GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sweet Home 3D application interface being actively used, with items selected from the catalog and placed in the plan, rather than just a terminal window.

integrity.description: Agent modified the correct starter file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Sweet Home 3D window title should indicate that 'soundstage_starter.sh3d' (or a subsequently saved version of it) is the file being edited.

integrity.description: Agent did not use scripts to bypass manual design work.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows visible executing Python or bash scripts that directly inject XML or modify the .sh3d archive contents to bypass the GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying 'soundstage_starter.sh3d' in Sweet Home 3D. Verify the following features: 1) Wall creation (partition walls with an open fourth wall). 2) Room definition (at least 3 named rooms). 3) Floor color (distinct colors/textures on at least 2 rooms). 4) Furniture placement in the apartment (>=1 sofa, >=1 table, >=2 residential chairs, >=2 appliances, >=2 decor items). 5) Production zone setup (>=4 lights, >=2 desks, >=4 office chairs/stools). 6) Dimension annotation (>=2 dimension lines between the camera zone and set seating). The passing threshold is 70/100 points.
